rulings.Case Title: REBECCA NESTLE ET AL VS. ELIZABETH COURT, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File Amended Answers

rulings.Case Title: KINSON WONG VS. JOE LING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 9, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANTS THOMAS WONG, C.K. KWAN, EDMOND HON, 633 PARTNERSHIP, 633 HOLDINGS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts in support of the cause of action for fraud as to each defendant and to clarify the allegations: (1) to allege in good faith facts to support standing in of Plaintiff Wong or to substitute Plaintiff (paragraph 13); (2) to allege facts in good faith giving rise to Partnership liability, individual partners' liability, and 633 Holdings, Inc. successor liability; and to allege facts in support of the conclusion in paragraph 15 that Ling "did not have the ability to ensure the restaurant's right to remain in its location¿"; (3) to allege facts supporting delayed discovery regarding misrepresentations made in 1990, including but not limited to the events alleged in paragraphs 19 and 20. All other arguments raised by the defendants and not addressed by this tentative may be renewed, if necessary and proper, upon the filing of the amended complaint. =(501/REQ)
